jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Metropolis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare:
Metropolis Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
